meta.description: Backend logic specification for cTrader automation, OCR parsing, and strategy execution.

models.name: OHLCV
models.validation: high >= low && high >= open && high >= close && low <= open && low <= close

models.name: Signal
models.description: Output from the Rule Evaluation Engine.

models.name: OrderRequest
models.description: Normalized order object before sending to cTrader.

steps.logic: Convert to grayscale -> Increase contrast -> Binarize -> Detect grid lines to infer scale.
Use Google Vision API / Tesseract. Extract numeric axis labels. Identify candlestick bodies (green/red) and wicks.
Map pixel coordinates to price/time values based on axis interpolation.
Check H>=L constraint. Detect missing candles (gaps). Normalize timezone to UTC.

implementations.name: RSI
implementations.formula: 100 - (100 / (1 + RS)) where RS = SmoothAvgGain / SmoothAvgLoss (Wilder's Smoothing)

implementations.name: MACD
implementations.signature: macd(source: number[], fast: int, slow: int, signal: int)
implementations.formula: MACD Line = EMA(fast) - EMA(slow); Signal Line = EMA(MACD Line, signal); Histogram = MACD - Signal

rule_evaluation.logic: Evaluate AST (Abstract Syntax Tree). Supports nested boolean operators (AND, OR, NOT).
rule_evaluation.debounce: Signal must persist for 'N' ticks or 'N' candles to be valid.
rule_evaluation.conflict_resolution: If BUY and SELL signals trigger simultaneously, prioritize 'FLAT' (no action) or the signal with higher confidence score.

flow: IF mode == 'PAPER': Update Internal Virtual Ledger
execution_engine.retry_policy: Exponential backoff (max 3 retries) on network errors. No retry on logical rejections (e.g. 'Not Enough Money').

endpoints.description: Trigger a strategy execution run (dry-run or live).

security.api_keys: Stored in Vault/AWS Secrets Manager. Injected into runtime via Env Vars.
security.encryption: AES-256 for storing user API secrets at rest. TLS 1.3 for all data in transit.
security.audit: Immutable write-once logs for all trade executions.

scenarios: Ensure Buy signal is ignored if max_open_positions is reached.
Verify position sizing calculates 0 lots if risk > account balance.
Test Idempotency: Send same order UUID twice, ensure only 1 execution.
OCR: Validate rejection of charts with non-monotonic time axes.
